items.title: Dupilumab Achieves Record $11.9 Billion in Global Sales Amidst Continued Growth
items.summary: Dupilumab (Dupixent) continues strong growth with €10.7 billion in 2023 sales and $4.34 billion in Q2 2025. FDA approval for COPD in September 2024 and expansion to chronic spontaneous urticaria in children unlock new market opportunities. The drug demonstrates clinical superiority over competitors like Xolair, with market projections extending to 2034 across multiple indications and geographic regions.
